steps.title: Follow the method sequence
steps.content: The passage describes steps in order: first, researchers suspended the cutout; next, they adjusted the suspension point; ultimately, they found the center.

steps.title: Reject nonsequential transitions
steps.content: Choice B signals a restatement, Choice C signals contrast, and Choice D repeats the first-step signal already used. The remaining transition correctly introduces the next action in the process. The answer is A.
